creator: andreas@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: andreas->asami

Why did the responsible person change? (Ctrl-D to end) 
Satoshi, as I wrote in my e-mail, the xforms changes are ok. 
I tried to compile xfmail myself and detected, that the author 
of the patches didn't submit pathces for the following things: 
- xfmail/patches/patch-aa is no longer needed 
- a patch is missing, that xfmail uses it's own 
faces lib. Parallel to the ui subdir there is a libcompface 
directory. The needed library isn't compiled and build of 
xfmail complains about missing -lfaces. 
Perhaps we could use our own libcompface, but I get ld errors, when 
I tried to make this change. 

faces.o: Undefined symbol `_compface' referenced from text segment 

Maybe the author of these port update should take a more close 
look, how he did get this beast compiled at his site ;-)
